scenario: betweenness_centrality (Brandes) on connected sparse random graph
metric: per_iter_ms (wall-clock, single run; graph build + 1 warmup excluded)
variance_caveat: CV 4.7% — shared swarm host under heavy load (load_avg ~51 on 64 cores, governor=powersave). Absolute latency is noisy; hotspot RANKING is taken from perf self-time attribution which is robust to host load.
